item_specifications.specific_uses_for_product: For indoor use by dogs weighing 35-60 pounds
item_specifications.special_feature: Chewproof, Durable, Easy Assembly, Eco-Friendly, Foldable

about_item: 【2025 Newest No Assembly Design】Forget the hassle of complicated setups! This foldable dog crate furniture comes fully pre-assembled, so you can use it straight out of the box. Folds flat for easy storage or moving — perfect for seasonal use or when you need extra space.

【Convenient Feeding】Our dog kennel indoor has a swivel door that makes the stainless-steel dog bowls 360° rotatable. The bowls can be adjusted to two heights, suiting dogs of different sizes. It makes meal easy and pleasant for dogs and then avoid the scatter of food, sparing your cleaning trouble

【Personalized Touch】The name tag on decorative dog kennel front is like a canvas for you to pour out your unique love and warmth for your furry friend. Let your creativity flow as you decorate it, making the dog crate not only a practical piece of furniture but a symbol of the deep bond you share

【Heavy-Duty Build for Large Dogs】Crafted from sturdy wood and 0.47-inch diameter steel tubes, this large dog crate supports dogs up to 100 lbs without sagging. The reinforced base with steel bars adds extra durability, ensuring long-lasting use

【Multi-Functional & Stylish】More than just a dog cage, this piece doubles as a modern end table, side table, or coffee table, seamlessly blending with your home décor. The spacious top surface is perfect for displaying plants, books, or decorative items(Panels made of Fsc-Certified wood)

【Customer Support You Can Trust】We’re here for you before and after your purchase! For any questions, reach out to us—we respond within 24 hours to ensure a smooth experience. Your satisfaction is our top priority

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate easy to assemble with no tools required, and appreciate its quality and appearance, with one noting it blends well with room decor. The crate is well-constructed, sturdy, and spacious enough for medium to large dogs, while being foldable for easy storage. Customers consider it worth the price.

This is a great product with easy assembly, how ever the durability was not there....

authors_reviews.title: Great buy. Good quality, and stylish
authors_reviews.text: We have had this crate for almost 9 months. It’s very durable, and I absolutely loved how easy it was to set up. Straight out of the box, I just unfolded it. No screws or anything to do. It’s very well made, strong/sturdy, and stylish. Overall a good buy. I’d buy it again.
authors_reviews.author: A. Freking

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for Baxter!
authors_reviews.text: I LOVE THIS CRATE!!! I really love that the bottom lifts up so I get under it when toys inevitably roll under. It looks good, feels very sturdy, was way easy to assemble, and my pup loves it. I really like that bowls can be on the outside or inside of the crate! It was a little bit heavy to bring in, but I wouldn’t want to sacrifice quality for that. Very minor inconvenience since it’s going to stay in one place. But I love that it does fold up for when I do have to move it. I probably could’ve gotten the smaller one, but I’m glad he has some room to turn around without bumping into the walls.
authors_reviews.author: Jamie

authors_reviews.title: Best crate we’ve ever had
authors_reviews.text: This is the best crate we’ve ever had (and we’ve had them all). Our newest dog is a crate kinda guy. We had one of those all metal ones and he would go in it just fine when we were going out but didn’t hang out in it. Now that we have this one he hangs out in it as does our older dog who is NOT a crate kinda guy.This was super easy to put together, just unfold it. It’s very heavy and sturdy and it looks like a piece of furniture. This was worth every penny.
authors_reviews.author: Bru

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful Addition
authors_reviews.text: Love this. Great quality and very sturdy. Very easy to assemble. It took less than 15 minutes. Love the rotating food door and metal name plate. Easy to fold down. Wonderful!
authors_reviews.author: Tammy S. Magwood

authors_reviews.title: Overall, nice. However, the door does not open a full 180 degrees and cannot be fastened, opened.
authors_reviews.text: Just received the PS-DC108-27/31/41 dog crate.I am pleased with the unit, but have a few concerns.1) The chalk/magnet - plastic, shipping, container box - arrived broken. Needless to say, the chalk was in little pieces. (Minor issue, I didn't plan on using the chalk.)2) The magnets on the "paw" magnets, had all detached. (Minor issue, I super glued them back on.)*3). The door hinges do not allow the door to open a full 180 degrees. And, there is no way to secure the door in its open position. I've solved this problem by lifting the front legs higher than the rear. Then, I mounted a hefty magnet to the left (as you face the unit) that will hold the door open when it is bent (forcibly) back to the full 180 degrees.I wish the door could be reversible. And, I wish there was a door option on the end of the unit.4) Two pieces of laminate were in the packaging. They were 3/4" * 5/8" * 23 5/8". I'm guessing that these were for packaging purposes, only. Since, no mention of these were made in the instructions.*My biggest concern is that the door hinges could have been better aligned and placed.Still, I have the skills to have made this work. And, the product as a whole, is fine. I'd give it 3 1/2 to 4 stars.This crate is easy to set up. The crate is very solid. For the money, I would have liked a higher quality wood for the top and floor. But, what is provided, suffices. The crate is aesthetically acceptable. The top provides a nice space for items...
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Highly Recommend — Strong, Secure, and Thoughtfully Designed!
authors_reviews.text: I always rely on product reviews when shopping, so I hope this one helps someone else!I have a medium-sized dog named Roxie — she’s half Rottweiler, half Dachshund (an unusual mix, I know 😉). She’s incredibly smart, strong, and determined — and like most dogs, not a fan of being confined. Her first crate didn’t stand a chance: she managed to bend the metal bars with her mouth and even figured out how to unlock the door. (Thank goodness for camera footage — I couldn’t believe it until I saw it!)After days of research, I came across this crate, and it has exceeded my expectations in every way. It’s affordable, made with high-quality materials, easy to assemble, and completely foldable for portability. It also comes with thoughtful extras: a hanging chalkboard name tag, four paw print magnets, and two stainless steel bowls that rotate in and out of the crate using built-in holders.Roxie did manage to pull out the pin that keeps the bowls from rotating — but to her surprise, the opening isn’t big enough for her to escape through (lol!). More importantly, she hasn’t been able to pry the bars open — not even close. The frame is solid and secure, built to withstand even the most determined escape artist.This is hands down the best pet-related purchase I’ve made in a long time. If your dog is clever and strong like mine, do yourself a favor and get this crate. You won’t regret it — I’d give it 10 stars if I could!
authors_reviews.author: Dawn D.

authors_reviews.title: Easy to assemble
authors_reviews.text: Good quality looks good in any room, easy to assemble and easy to move around with one person . Latch could be made a little stronger but it works . Definitely would recommend for the money
authors_reviews.author: Cynthia

authors_reviews.title: Incredibly well-made
authors_reviews.text: This is absolutely exactly as advertised. It’s wonderful. I think there’s three different sizes. We got the larger one even though we have a somewhat smaller dog we wanted her to have some room to walk around. No assembly is required at all. It simply folds out. It’s incredibly sturdy. There’s a video that shows you how it works. The cute part that we don’t really use is that there’s a bowl for water and food that hook to the front but you can turn them around so they’re inside for the dog to eat or turn them back around outside where the dog doesn’t have access to them. It’s really pretty slick.
authors_reviews.author: J. R.
